title: Recipes Plus
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/VydIF44.png) ### [Join the discord to interact with me and others about Minecraft](https://discord.gg/QZUJtsbkcY)
## ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) OVERVIEW ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) This datapack intends to add common sense additions like dye mixing or slabs to blocks. Minecraft recipes could use a reboot and this is perfect for that. | Included | | :-: | | [![](https://i.imgur.com/QFQjJau.png "Better Elytras (PMC)")](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/gen-s-armored-elytras-datapack/) [![](https://i.imgur.com/PJ4jTnf.png "[CLOSED] - Stonecutter Salvage")](https://modrinth.com/project/w4oj6UFD) |
## ![](https://i.imgur.com/A8bTUqW.png) FEATURES ![](https://i.imgur.com/A8bTUqW.png) - *Visit the [wiki](https://github.com/GenMode/Minecraft/wiki/Recipes-Plus) for more information*
Recipes - 20+ dye related recipes - 100+ more stonecutting recipes - Armor Stand, Painting, and Shelf modification - Chain armor recipes - Coral bleaching and rejuvenating - Elytra fortifying - Flower duplicating - Horse & Nautilus armor recipes - Ice recipe - Pottery sherd copying - Resource salvaging - Stairs to slabs and slabs to blocks - Woodcutting - Many more recipes not listed

## ![](https://i.imgur.com/sdGA9Mw.png) ALSO CHECK OUT ![](https://i.imgur.com/sdGA9Mw.png) | Datapacks | | :-: | | [![](https://i.imgur.com/PJ4jTnf.png "[CLOSED] - Stonecutter Salvage")](https://modrinth.com/project/w4oj6UFD) [![](https://i.imgur.com/r2v2UQI.png "Better Babies")](https://modrinth.com/project/W9qgAZfz) [![](https://i.imgur.com/zMxZbG1.png "Caveat")](https://modrinth.com/project/FMLlwNZj) [![](https://i.imgur.com/NzWnHuE.png "Reader")](https://modrinth.com/project/F78KXQyP) [![](https://i.imgur.com/o78n1Rj.png "Vesture")](https://modrinth.com/project/L45eoNGD) |
